key_events: Global markets rally as geopolitical tensions ease after U.S. postponed Iran bombing
Asian equities rose 1.3%, Nikkei advanced over 2%
Oil prices show volatility, Brent crude up 1% at $100.94

key_highlights: Global art market grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion
US maintains dominant position with 44% market share
Contemporary/Postwar art remains largest sector, with Modern/Impressionist showing strong growth
